mapper.select: SELECT ep.eval_period_id AS evalPeriodId, ep.eval_year AS evalYear, ep.eval_sequence AS evalSequence, ep.eval_type AS evalType, COALESCE(qe.status, 'NO_INPUT') AS qualStatus FROM evaluation_period ep LEFT JOIN qualitative_evaluation qe ON qe.evaluation_period_id = ep.eval_period_id AND qe.evaluatee_id = #{employeeId} AND qe.evaluation_level = 3 WHERE ep.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' LIMIT 1

SELECT qn.quantitative_evaluation_id AS quantitativeEvaluationId, ep.eval_period_id AS evalPeriodId, ep.eval_year AS evalYear, ep.eval_sequence AS evalSequence, qn.uph_score AS uphScore, qn.yield_score AS yieldScore, qn.lead_time_score AS leadTimeScore, qn.actual_error AS actualError, qn.s_quant AS sQuant, qn.t_score AS tScore, qn.material_shielding AS materialShielding, qn.status FROM quantitative_evaluation qn JOIN evaluation_period ep ON ep.eval_period_id = qn.eval_period_id WHERE qn.employee_id = #{employeeId} AND qn.eval_period_id = #{periodId} LIMIT 1

SELECT qe.qualitative_evaluation_id AS qualitativeEvaluationId, ep.eval_period_id AS evalPeriodId, ep.eval_year AS evalYear, ep.eval_sequence AS evalSequence, qe.grade, qe.score, qe.eval_items AS evalItems, qe.status FROM qualitative_evaluation qe JOIN evaluation_period ep ON ep.eval_period_id = qe.evaluation_period_id WHERE qe.evaluatee_id = #{employeeId} AND qe.evaluation_period_id = #{periodId} AND qe.evaluation_level = 3 LIMIT 1

SELECT qe.evaluation_level AS evaluationLevel, qe.eval_comment AS evalComment, qe.input_method AS inputMethod, qe.status, ep.eval_year AS evalYear, ep.eval_sequence AS evalSequence FROM qualitative_evaluation qe JOIN evaluation_period ep ON ep.eval_period_id = qe.evaluation_period_id WHERE qe.evaluatee_id = #{employeeId} AND qe.evaluation_period_id = #{periodId} AND qe.status IN ('SUBMITTED', 'CONFIRMED') ORDER BY qe.evaluation_level ASC

SELECT qe.qualitative_evaluation_id AS qualitativeEvaluationId, ep.eval_period_id AS evalPeriodId, ep.eval_year AS evalYear, ep.eval_sequence AS evalSequence, ep.eval_type AS evalType, qe.grade, qe.score, qe.status, qe.confirmed_at AS confirmedAt, CASE WHEN qe.confirmed_at IS NOT NULL AND qe.confirmed_at >= UTC_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL 7 DAY THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS appealable FROM qualitative_evaluation qe JOIN evaluation_period ep ON ep.eval_period_id = qe.evaluation_period_id WHERE qe.evaluatee_id = #{employeeId} AND qe.evaluation_level = 3 ORDER BY ep.eval_year DESC, ep.eval_sequence DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM qualitative_evaluation qe WHERE qe.evaluatee_id = #{employeeId} AND qe.evaluation_level = 3
SELECT eval_period_id FROM evaluation_period WHERE status = 'IN_PROGRESS' LIMIT 1
